# BRD Template

Use this structure for every `BRD.md` generated by the requirement-kit.

---

```markdown
# Business Requirements Document (BRD)
**Module**: <module-id>
**Version**: 1.0
**Date**: <YYYY-MM-DD>
**Prepared By**: AIKit — Requirement Kit
**Status**: Draft

---

## 1. Executive Summary
<2–4 sentence summary of what is being built and why.>

---

## 2. Business Objectives
| # | Objective | Success Metric |
|---|-----------|---------------|
| 1 | | |

---

## 3. Scope

### 3.1 In Scope
- <item>

### 3.2 Out of Scope
- <item>

---

## 4. Stakeholders
| Role | Name / Team | Responsibility |
|------|-------------|----------------|
| Product Owner | | Final decisions |
| Business Analyst | | Requirements |
| Architect | | Technical design |
| Developer | | Implementation |
| QA | | Verification |

---

## 5. Functional Requirements

### 5.1 <Feature Area 1>
| ID | Requirement | Priority | Source |
|----|-------------|----------|--------|
| FR-001 | | Must Have | |

### 5.2 <Feature Area 2>
| ID | Requirement | Priority | Source |
|----|-------------|----------|--------|
| FR-010 | | Should Have | |

---

## 6. Non-Functional Requirements
| ID | Category | Requirement | Target |
|----|----------|-------------|--------|
| NFR-001 | Performance | API response time | < 200ms p95 |
| NFR-002 | Availability | System uptime | 99.9% |
| NFR-003 | Security | Authentication | OAuth2 / JWT |
| NFR-004 | Scalability | Concurrent users | 10,000 |

---

## 7. Business Rules
See [business-rules.md](./business-rules.md) for the complete list.

Key rules:
| ID | Rule Summary | Category |
|----|-------------|----------|
| BR-001 | | |

---

## 8. Workflows
See [workflows.md](./workflows.md) for detailed workflow definitions.

Key workflows:
| ID | Workflow Name | Actors |
|----|--------------|--------|
| WF-001 | | |

---

## 9. Data Requirements
### 9.1 Key Entities
| Entity | Description | Key Attributes |
|--------|-------------|----------------|
| | | |

### 9.2 Data Retention
- <retention policy>

---

## 10. Integration Requirements
| System | Direction | Protocol | Data |
|--------|-----------|----------|------|
| | In/Out | REST/Event | |

---

## 11. Assumptions & Constraints
### Assumptions
- <assumption>

### Constraints
- <technical constraint>
- <business constraint>

---

## 12. Risks
| ID | Risk | Probability | Impact | Mitigation |
|----|------|-------------|--------|-----------|
| R-001 | | High/Med/Low | High/Med/Low | |

---

## 13. Glossary
| Term | Definition |
|------|-----------|
| | |

---

## 14. Revision History
| Version | Date | Author | Changes |
|---------|------|--------|---------|
| 1.0 | <date> | AIKit | Initial draft |
```
